query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_livestreams,
  SUM(CASE WHEN liver_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_liver_id,
  SUM(CASE WHEN liver_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_liver_id
FROM brand_livestreams 
WHERE deleted_at IS NULL;
